description: Flash All Purpose Lavender Floor Cleaning Liquid (1.5L) offers a powerful solution for maintaining cleanliness throughout your home. Its versatile formula effectively removes up to 100% of dirt and grease, leaving surfaces with a brilliant shine and no harsh residues. Infused with a delightful lavender fragrance, it ensures your home smells as clean as it looks. The cleaner is formulated with 12% plant-based surfactants, making it an eco-friendly choice. Free from bleach and ammonia, it's safe for various surfaces and comes in a recyclable bottle, supporting environmental sustainability. ‚Äã
